architectural_decision.decision: Break the locked v2 curriculum and rebuild around the Report 1 phase-based zero-to-software-engineer path.
architectural_decision.v2_policy: curriculum.v2.json is frozen legacy import data, not the active source of truth.
architectural_decision.core_rule: Keep good lessons, break the old path, optimize for learner progression, proof, documentation quality, and job readiness.
architectural_decision.full_bundle_policy: Split files are authoritative. curriculum.v3.full.generated.json is an optional generated snapshot for review/export only.

assessments.title: Module 00 Assessment — Orientation
assessments.purpose: Verify that the learner can apply and explain Orientation.

criteria.title: Conceptual clarity
criteria.description: Learner can explain the concepts without memorized magic.

levels.description: Explains mechanics, usage, and mistakes clearly.

criteria.title: Implementation
criteria.description: Learner can produce working code or an appropriate artifact.

criteria.title: Proof
criteria.description: Learner can verify the work through tests, checks, or review.

criteria.title: Communication
criteria.description: Learner can communicate decisions and tradeoffs.

manual_review_questions: What problem does Orientation solve?
What mistakes should beginners avoid?
Where would this appear in real software engineering?
assessments.retake_policy: Learner may retry after fixing rubric gaps and writing a short correction note.
